# Finnish Biodiversity Indicators

Finnish biodiversity indicators (FBI) is a service providing time series
of abundance indices and related metrics for Finland. The input data for
the indices are provided by the [Finnish Biodiversity Information
Facility](https://laji.fi/en/ "FinBIF").

![Biodiversity Indicator for Birds in Winter (Whole of
Finland)](https://indicators.laji.fi/svg/wb?fontsize=16&scale=60 "Winter Birds")

Biodiversity Indicator for Birds in Winter (Whole of Finland)

# Package index

## Processing functions

Functions to process indicator input data

- [`combine_with_surveys()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/combine_with_surveys.md)
  : Combine with surveys
- [`format_date()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/format_date.md)
  : Format date
- [`pick_first_survey_in_fortnight()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/pick_first_survey_in_fortnight.md)
  : Pick first survey in fortnight
- [`pick_first_survey_in_winter()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/pick_first_survey_in_winter.md)
  : Pick first survey in winter
- [`pick_first_survey_in_year()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/pick_first_survey_in_year.md)
  : Pick first survey in year
- [`remove_all_zero_locations()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/remove_all_zero_locations.md)
  : Remove all-zero locations
- [`require_minimum_gaps()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/require_minimum_gaps.md)
  : Require minimum gaps
- [`require_minimum_weeks()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/require_minimum_weeks.md)
  : Require minimum weeks
- [`require_seven_fortnights()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/require_seven_fortnights.md)
  : Require seven fortnights
- [`require_two_years()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/require_two_years.md)
  : Require at least two years
- [`set_start_year()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/set_start_year.md)
  : Set start year
- [`sum_by_event()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/sum_by_event.md)
  : Sum by event
- [`sum_over_sections()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/sum_over_sections.md)
  : Sum over sections
- [`zero_fill()`](https://indicators-dev.laji.fi/docs/dev/dev/reference/zero_fill.md)
  : Zero fill
